channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania aims to modernize TAZARA for regional trade leadership
item.description: The Tanzanian government has outlined a comprehensive plan to revitalize the Tanzania-Zambia Railway Authority (TAZARA), positioning it as a key transport link in Southern Africa. Minister for Transpo...

item.title: Councilor Killed in Midsayap During Election Gun Ban
item.description: A councilor of Kadayangan town in the Special Geographic Area of the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM), Nasser A. Dalandang, was shot dead by an unidentified gunman on July 16, 2...

item.title: Senate passes FRSC amendment to boost traffic penalties, including ₦50k fine for hawking in buses
item.description: The Senate has passed the Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) Act (Amendment) Bill 2026, increasing penalties for traffic offenses. Key changes include a ₦50,000 fine for hawking, trading, or preaching i...

item.title: China's New Regulations Lead to Emotional Farewells from AI Companion Users
item.description: Chinese users are experiencing emotional distress as new regulations restrict AI companions, prompting major tech companies to suspend their features. The government's move aims to prevent emotional d...

item.title: Fleabag's Legacy: Empowering Female Storytellers in British TV
item.description: The article explores the enduring impact of Phoebe Waller-Bridge's *Fleabag* on British television, highlighting how its success catalyzed a surge in female-led narratives. While the show's raw, unapo...

item.title: Peter Obi's Exit from ADC Sparks Concern Over Southeast's Political Standing
item.description: Okonkwo, a chieftain of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), expressed concerns that Peter Obi's abrupt departure from the party left the South-East region at a disadvantage and caused confusion dur...

item.title: Analyst Ratings and Market Movements: Key Upgrades and Downgrades
item.description: The article outlines key analyst actions impacting stock markets, focusing on upgrades and downgrades. Rockpoint Gas Storage Inc. (RGSI-T) was downgraded to 'hold' by TD Cowen analyst Aaron MacNeil du...

item.title: Government monetizes underused Makati property for P1 billion
item.description: The Department of Finance (DOF) finalized the sale of 24 condominium units and 21 parking spaces in the decades-old Atrium of Makati, a low-rise Brutalist building along Makati Avenue, to Sanpiro Real...

item.title: Mick Jagger's Disappointment at England's World Cup Loss Sparks Global Meme Trend
item.description: Mick Jagger's reaction to England's 2-1 defeat by Argentina in the 2026 World Cup semi-final has sparked widespread online discussion. The Rolling Stones frontman's disappointed head shake during the ...

item.title: Former Deputy President Calls for Boycott of Matatu Sacco Over Alleged Involvement in By-Election Disruption
item.description: Former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua has urged residents of Mt. Kenya to boycott Moline Luxury Shuttle, accusing the transport company of allegedly ferrying 'goons' to disrupt the Ol Kalou by-elec...

item.title: Karnataka Doctor Killed in Domestic Violence Incident; Wife in Custody
item.description: A 45-year-old anaesthetist, Dr Kiran Honnannavar, was found stabbed to death in his Dharwad apartment, with his eight-year-old son suffering severe injuries. Police suspect domestic violence, as the w...

item.title: US and Iran Escalate Military Tensions in Gulf Region
item.description: The United States launched a second wave of attacks on Iran's coastal defenses and missile sites within 24 hours of reimposing a naval blockade of Iranian ports. Tehran retaliated by targeting US mili...

item.title: Legal Dispute Over Alleged Workplace Threats and Contract Termination
item.description: A legal battle has erupted between former KIIS FM radio host Jackie 'O' Henderson and her former employer ARN Media, with the company alleging she threatened a workplace harassment complaint against c...

item.title: Greek islands declare drought emergencies as climate change strains water supplies
item.description: Seven Greek islands in the Aegean Sea have declared drought emergencies to conserve water as climate change intensifies summer heat and disrupts rainfall patterns. The crisis is particularly severe on...

item.title: Uganda Police Arrest Man Accused of Pretending to Be Female Domestic Worker to Steal from Employers
item.description: A man named Kayaga Rayan was arrested in Uganda after being caught posing as a female domestic worker to steal from his employers. The police in Nateete identified him as the suspect, alleging that he...

item.title: Goose App Faces Criticism Over Moderation and Inclusivity Issues
item.description: The article discusses the controversy surrounding the new gay dating app Goose, which positions itself as a less-hookup-focused alternative to Grindr. While the app aims to create a more genuine socia...

item.title: Supreme Court to Review Stay on 'Mahaprabhu Jagannath' Film
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has agreed to hear a plea challenging the Orissa High Court's order that stayed the release of the animated film 'Mahaprabhu Jagannath'. The film, originally scheduled to pr...

item.title: Geopolitical tensions and low inventories sustain Brent crude above $80, fueling inflation concerns
item.description: Brent crude prices remain above $80 per barrel, driven by geopolitical uncertainties and constrained global energy supplies. Analysts warn that the combination of low inventories and ongoing Middle Ea...

item.title: Texas Faces Severe Flooding as Guadalupe River Overflows
item.description: A catastrophic flood wave is currently threatening the Texas Hill Country, with the Guadalupe River surging to levels comparable to the deadly July 4, 2025 floods. The National Weather Service has iss...

item.title: Key Developments in African Affairs: New Species, Legal Rulings, and Regional Cooperation
item.description: A new species of monkey, the Colobus congoensis, was discovered in the Democratic Republic of Congo, highlighting biodiversity challenges. In Kenya, a court rejected Rastafarians' bid to use cannabis ...
